examples.title: Algorithm: Pointer Basics
examples.code:
ALGORITHM PointerBasics
INPUT: None
OUTPUT: None

BEGIN
 DECLARE var AS INTEGER
 DECLARE ptr AS POINTER TO INTEGER
 SET var TO 5
 SET ptr TO ADDRESS OF var
 PRINT "Value of var: " + var
 PRINT "Address of var: " + ptr
 PRINT "Value at address ptr: " + DEREFERENCE(ptr)
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic operations of pointers, including declaration, assignment, and dereferencing.
